refnamediv.refpurpose: Makes a LINESTRING from WKB with the given SRID

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: The ST_LineFromWKB function, takes a well-known binary representation of geometry and a Spatial Reference System ID (SRID) and creates an instance of the appropriate geometry type - in this case, a LINESTRING geometry. This function plays the role of the Geometry Factory in SQL.
If an SRID is not specified, it defaults to 0. NULL is returned if the input bytea does not represent a LINESTRING.

note.para: OGC SPEC 3.2.6.2 - option SRID is from the conformance suite.
If you know all your geometries are LINESTRINGs, its more efficient to just use . This function just calls and adds additional validation that it returns a linestring.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting: SELECT ST_LineFromWKB(ST_AsBinary(ST_GeomFromText('LINESTRING(1 2, 3 4)'))) AS aline, ST_LineFromWKB(ST_AsBinary(ST_GeomFromText('POINT(1 2)'))) IS NULL AS null_return; aline | null_return ------------------------------------------------ 010200000002000000000000000000F ... | t
